faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about HookSniff
a1: HookSniff is a webhook delivery service for developers. We reliably deliver webhooks to your endpoints with automatic retries, HMAC signatures, and real-time monitoring. Think of it as a postal service for your HTTP callbacks.
q2: How is HookSniff different from Svix or Hookdeck?
a2: HookSniff offers similar features at 10x lower cost. Our Pro plan is $29/mo vs Svix at $490/mo. We also support 11 SDKs, FIFO delivery, CloudEvents, and a schema registry — features that competitors charge extra for or don't offer.
a3: Yes. HookSniff handles thousands of webhook deliveries daily with 99.9% uptime. We use PostgreSQL for durable storage, automatic retries with exponential backoff, and dead letter queues for failed deliveries.
a4: Sign up for a free account at hooksniff.vercel.app, get your API key, and create an endpoint. Send your first webhook in under 5 minutes with our quick start guide or SDK.
q5: Do I need a credit card to start?
a5: No. The free plan includes 10,000 webhook deliveries per month with no credit card required. Upgrade to Pro or Business when you need more.
q6: What payment methods do you accept?
a6: We accept all major credit cards via Stripe, and support Polar.sh for global payments and iyzico for Turkish customers. All plans are billed monthly.
q7: Can I change my plan at any time?
a7: Yes. Upgrade or downgrade anytime from your dashboard. Upgrades take effect immediately with prorated billing. Downgrades take effect at the end of your current billing period.
q8: What happens if I exceed my plan limits?
a8: We won't cut you off. If you exceed your webhook limit, additional deliveries are queued and processed when your limit resets. We'll notify you so you can upgrade if needed.
a9: Failed deliveries are retried with exponential backoff: 30s, 60s, 120s, 5min, 10min, 30min. After max attempts (default 5), the delivery moves to a dead letter queue for debugging.
a10: Every webhook delivery includes an X-HookSniff-Signature header containing an HMAC-SHA256 hash of the payload. Verify this signature on your end to ensure the webhook came from HookSniff and wasn't tampered with.
a11: Yes. In addition to HTTP POST delivery, HookSniff supports WebSocket connections for real-time event streaming. Configure WebSocket delivery per endpoint.
q12: What is the dead letter queue?
a12: The dead letter queue stores failed deliveries that exhausted all retry attempts. You can inspect payloads, error messages, and response codes to debug issues before replaying the delivery.
a13: Yes. All data is encrypted in transit (TLS) and at rest. We use HMAC-SHA256 for webhook signatures, Argon2id for password hashing, and support 2FA via TOTP. We're SOC 2 ready.
a14: Yes, for the duration of your plan's retention period (7-365 days depending on plan). Payloads are stored encrypted and automatically deleted after the retention period. You can also delete them manually.
q15: Can I use a custom domain?
a15: Yes. Business plan customers can configure custom domains for their webhook endpoints. SSL certificates are automatically provisioned via Let's Encrypt.
cantFindAnswer: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Our support team is here to help.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.heroSubtitle: Save 12+ months of webhook infrastructure development. Start free, scale when ready.
pricing.heroNote: No credit card required. No surprise charges. Cancel anytime.
pricing.payWhatYouUse: Only pay for what you actually send
pricing.payWhatYouUseDesc: Retries are free. Filtered messages are free. Failed deliveries that we retry 5 times still count as 1 webhook. We absorb the cost because reliable delivery is our promise.
pricing.roiDesc: See how much you save with HookSniff vs competitors.
buildOwnItems: Retry logic is hard to get right
pricing.startupDesc: We have special startup plans to help you grow. Pre-Series A startups get extended free tiers and significant discounts on paid plans.
pricing.ctaDesc: Join thousands of developers who trust HookSniff for webhook delivery.

pricingFaq.a: A webhook is an event delivered to your endpoint. Failed deliveries that are retried do not count as additional webhooks — retries are free. Filtered messages are also free.

pricingFaq.q: Do I need a credit card to start?
pricingFaq.a: No. You can sign up and start sending webhooks on the Free plan without a credit card. Upgrade when you need more volume or features.

pricingFaq.q: What happens if I exceed my plan limit?
pricingFaq.a: We never drop webhooks. If you exceed your monthly limit, additional events are metered at the per-plan rate. You can also set a hard cap in your dashboard settings.
Yes. A webhook includes all its retries. If a delivery fails and we retry it 3 times, that still counts as 1 webhook. We absorb the retry cost because reliable delivery is our core promise.
Yes. Upgrades take effect immediately and are prorated. Downgrades take effect at the start of your next billing cycle. No penalties, no hidden fees.
Yes! If you're an early-stage startup (pre-Series A), contact us at hello@hooksniff.com with your details. We offer significant discounts and extended free tiers.

pricingFaq.q: What's the difference between Pro and Business?
pricingFaq.a: Pro is for growing teams that need more volume and better monitoring. Business is for teams that need SLA guarantees, FIFO delivery, SSO, and dedicated support.
Yes. Annual billing saves you 20% compared to monthly. That's $278/year for Pro and $950/year for Business.

pricingFaq.q: What payment methods do you accept?
pricingFaq.a: We accept all major credit cards via Stripe. For Business and Enterprise plans, we also support invoicing and bank transfers.
Yes! HookSniff is open-source. You can self-host with Docker. Self-hosted instances get community support. Paid plans add priority support for self-hosted.
We support 11 SDKs: Node.js, Python, Rust, C#, Go, Swift, PHP, Elixir, Java, Kotlin, and Ruby.
Yes. All data is encrypted in transit (TLS 1.3) and at rest. We use HMAC-SHA256 for webhook signatures, Argon2 for password hashing, and support 2FA/TOTP.
Yes. We are GDPR compliant. We process data in EU regions, support data export/deletion requests, and have a published privacy policy.
Free and Pro plans have a 99.9% uptime target (best effort). Business plans include a 99.9% uptime SLA with credits if we miss it.

pricingFaq.q: How does HookSniff compare to Svix?
pricingFaq.a: HookSniff offers similar features at 10x lower cost. Svix starts at $490/month; HookSniff Pro is $49/month. We also support more SDKs (11 vs 6), FIFO delivery, and CloudEvents.
Yes. You can export all your webhook logs, endpoint configurations, and delivery history as JSON or CSV from the dashboard.
